OmniIntegrationProcedure.customJavaScript: {"LicenseTypeNameForBLApplication":"Sewerage Holding Tank Permit to Construct","PHOCSFacilityInformation":{"AdditionalFacilityInformation":{"Documentswillbeincluded":true,"IsSewerageSystemDistance30m":false,"PlotPlanSpecsAttached":true,"StructureName":"test","StructureType":"Single Family","ConstructionType":"New Construction","DailyFlowofSewerageSystem":"","SoilDepthcm":23,"PlanSpecsConsistentWith":"No source of standard practice","DistancetoSurfaceWaterInm":1233,"Conflicts":"Yes – conflict exists/will arise","RelatedHealthOrder":"Yes – copy included"},"BasicInformation":{"PHOCSAccountName":"Sewerage Facility - S3DEMO","PHOCSPhone":"9879450818","PHOCSPhoneExtension":"23","PHOCSFacilityEmail":"test@123.com","PHOCSFax":"1234567809","PHOCSWebsite":" https://www.example.com","PHOCSStartDate":"2025-10-10","PHOCSDescription":"test"},"Category":{"PHOCSType":"Sewerage","PHOCSCategoryL1":"Holding Tank","PHOCSCategoryL2":"","PHOCSCategoryL3":""},"AddressInformation":{"PHOCSPhysicalAddress":"test","PHOCSPhysicalLocation":"test","PHOCSMailingAddress":"test","PHOCSBillingAddress":"test"},"PropertyInformation":{"PropertyType":"Private Property","TaxRollNumber":1234,"ParcelID":1234,"Lot":1234,"Block":1234,"DistrictLot":1234,"Section":1234,"Quadrant":1234,"Township":1234,"Range":1234,"Meridian":1234,"Plan":1234},"PHOCSApplicationDetails":{"ApplicationDetails":{"PHOCSLegalAgentOfOwner":true,"PHOCSPrimaryOwner":null,"PHOCSApplicant":null,"PHOCSEstimatedConstructionCost":900,"PHOCSDescriptionOfProposedWorks":"test","BLALicenseTypeName":"Sewerage Holding Tank Permit to Construct"}},"LicenseTypeNameForBLA":"Sewerage Holding Tank Permit to Construct","PHOCSSpecifications":{"SpecificationBlock":{"ResidentialNoOfBedrooms":4,"HoldingTankWillServeSpecify":null,"ConnectedToPublicWaterSystem":true,"RestrictiveCovenantsDetails":null,"HoldingTankWillServe":"Residential","EstimatedDailySewageFlow":34,"LotSizeHectares":34,"DistanceFromWaterLineOwnWellInM":23,"DistanceFromWellsStreamsLakesInM":24,"DepthToWaterTableInCM":23,"RestrictiveCovenants":"Yes","HoldingTankManufacturer":"test","TankMaterial":"test","TankTotalVolumeInL":78,"ProposedDepthofBurialInM":79}}}}

omniProcessElements.name: ExtractBLArecord
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "inputParam" : "BLARecId", "element" : "upsertFacilityAccount:BusinessLicenseApplication_2:Id" } ], "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "elementValueMap" : { }, "failOnStepError" : true, "internalNotes" : "", "isActive" : true, "chainOnStep" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "ignoreCache" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "actionMessage" : "", "additionalOutput" : { }, "sendJSONPath" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "id" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "restOptions" : { }, "bundle" : "DMExtractBLARecordCreated", "sendJSONNode" : "" }
